properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v1 v2 v1 v2 v2 v2 v3 v1

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: My heart's desire is to bless Your Holy Name My heart's desire Is to lift You up today

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Even in the times of troubles, even in the times of trials My heart's desire Is to bless Your Holy Name

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Even in the times of troubles, even in the times of trials My heart's desire Is to bless Your Holy Name My heart's desire Is to bless Your Holy Name
